tokens.name: ob.s.color.interaction.focus_ring.inversity_normal
tokens.description: Focus ring for Interaction. Use on all focusable elements to communicate keyboard focus; must remain visible against any surface.

tokens.name: ob.s.color.interaction.focus_ring.inversity_flipped
tokens.description: Focus ring for Interaction. Use on all focusable elements to communicate keyboard focus; must remain visible against any surface.

groups.title: Standard States: Foreground (fg)
groups.description: Foreground colors for standard interaction states

tokens.description: Foreground for Interaction. Enabled state: Use for text and icons in the default, ready-to-interact state.

tokens.description: Foreground for Interaction. Enabled state: Use for text and icons in the default, ready-to-interact state.

tokens.description: Foreground for Interaction. Hover state: Use for text and icons when a pointer enters the interactive area.

tokens.description: Foreground for Interaction. Selected state: Use for text and icons on a currently selected or active element.

tokens.name: ob.s.color.interaction.standard_states.fg.visited.inversity_normal
tokens.description: Foreground for Interaction. Visited state: Use for text and icons on links or elements that have already been activated.

tokens.description: Foreground for Interaction. Visited state: Use for text and icons on links or elements that have already been activated.

tokens.description: Foreground for Interaction. Disabled state: Use for text and icons on elements that are not available for interaction.

tokens.description: Low contrast foreground for interaction. Use for text and icons in subtle or secondary interactive states.
